required_preferences.fact: Regularly participates in routine website maintenance to facilitate cross-team integration — no longer restricts hands-on involvement to major platform changes alone

required_preferences.fact: Makes Friday evenings flexible for solo parenting or family time — no longer holds them exclusively for her husband due to his travel schedule

required_preferences.fact: Starts each workday with a guided meditation app — skips meditation only if running late
Adheres to a strict nightly pre-bedtime routine to optimize CPAP effectiveness — avoids late-evening screens, snacks, or distractions
Plans her upcoming week every Sunday night, sets calendar blocks for family, work, and leisure — never starts Monday without this review
Checks work email only after breakfast — never before her morning meditation session
